title: Process Engineer Vacancy at CEAT Tyres - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at CEAT Tyres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
